notes:
What's new in V3.1.8:
• Story Cutter now shows speaker names from transcript data or Premiere Pro speaker labels at every cut point
• /batch now handles more than 20 edits — no cap on batch job size
• Batch inserts now name each edit so you can navigate directly to the cut you need
• You can now stop a batch insert mid-execution and pick back up without waiting
• Minor insert speed improvements on longer batches
• Grok Imagine Quality mode — higher-fidelity image generation and editing for hero shots and client deliverables
• Fixed: some image generation models incorrectly refusing valid prompts
